flavorText: Glamour Bards channel fey majesty to command attention and shape the flow of battle.

features.description: As a bonus action, expend a Bardic Inspiration die. A number of creatures within 60 feet up to your Charisma modifier gain temporary hit points equal to the roll + your Charisma modifier and can use reactions to move up to their speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
After a 1-minute performance, choose a number of humanoids up to your Charisma modifier who watched and listened. They are charmed by you for 1 hour.
As a bonus action, you cloak yourself in majesty for 1 minute. While active, you can cast Command as a bonus action on each of your turns without expending a spell slot. Usable once per long rest.
As a bonus action, assume an awe-inspiring form. Until your next turn, creatures attempting to attack you must succeed on a Charisma save or choose another target or lose the attack.

glamour-mantle-of-inspiration.name: Mantle of Inspiration
glamour-mantle-of-inspiration.summary: Spend inspiration to reposition and protect allies in one flashy support move.
glamour-mantle-of-inspiration.description:
As a bonus action, expend a Bardic Inspiration die. A number of creatures within 60 feet up to your Charisma modifier gain temporary hit points equal to the roll + your Charisma modifier and can use reactions to move up to their speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

Mantle of Inspiration turns Bardic Inspiration into a tempo tool. It matters because it can rescue positioning, create aggression windows, and make the Glamour bard feel like a battle conductor.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

glamour-enthralling-performance.name: Enthralling Performance
glamour-enthralling-performance.summary: A strong performance can leave onlookers charmed, captivated, or socially exposed.
glamour-enthralling-performance.description:
After a 1-minute performance, choose a number of humanoids up to your Charisma modifier who watched and listened. They are charmed by you for 1 hour.

Enthralling Performance is a scene-control feature for social and downtime play. The important thing is helping the player see when performance can be the opener to a negotiation, infiltration, or manipulation plan.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

glamour-mantle-of-majesty.name: Mantle of Majesty
glamour-mantle-of-majesty.summary: You project overwhelming courtly command, turning your presence into direct pressure on the field.
glamour-mantle-of-majesty.description:
As a bonus action, you cloak yourself in majesty for 1 minute. While active, you can cast Command as a bonus action on each of your turns without expending a spell slot. Usable once per long rest.

Mantle of Majesty is one of the Glamour bard’s signature swing turns. It should feel like a premium control state, not just another passive line in the feature list.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

glamour-unbreakable-majesty.name: Unbreakable Majesty
glamour-unbreakable-majesty.summary: Enemies find it genuinely harder to commit violence against you once your glamour peaks.
glamour-unbreakable-majesty.description:
As a bonus action, assume an awe-inspiring form. Until your next turn, creatures attempting to attack you must succeed on a Charisma save or choose another target or lose the attack.

Unbreakable Majesty is both defense and presence. It should read like a high-level answer to focused fire, hostile attention, and social intimidation all at once.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.
